allow: PowerShell($f = "C:\\Users\\alema\\Downloads\\Trabalho\\Lagos\\Site Principal\\.next\\static\\chunks\\0uk7h3a01z98-.css"; $t = Get-Content $f -Raw; "len: $\($t.Length\)"; $iRing = $t.IndexOf\(".ring-1"\); $iFrame = $t.IndexOf\(".browser-frame"\); $iGrain = $t.IndexOf\(".grain"\); "ring-1 at: $iRing"; "browser-frame at: $iFrame"; "grain at: $iGrain"; if \($iRing -ge 0\) { $t.Substring\($iRing, 320\) })

PowerShell($f = "C:\\Users\\alema\\Downloads\\Trabalho\\Lagos\\Site Principal\\.next\\static\\chunks\\0uk7h3a01z98-.css"; $t = Get-Content $f -Raw; $iFrame = $t.IndexOf\(".browser-frame"\); $t.Substring\($iFrame, 350\); "`n=== layer header before ring-1 ==="; $iU = $t.IndexOf\("@layer utilities"\); "first @layer utilities at: $iU"; $count = \([regex]::Matches\($t, "@layer utilities"\)\).Count; "occurrences: $count"; foreach \($m in [regex]::Matches\($t, "@layer utilities"\)\) { $m.Index })

PowerShell($p = "C:\\Users\\alema\\Downloads\\Trabalho\\Lagos\\Site Principal\\.next\\static\\chunks\\0uk7h3a01z98-.css"; $s = Get-Content $p -Raw; "len=$\($s.Length\)"; $iRing = $s.IndexOf\(".ring-1"\); $iFrame = $s.IndexOf\(".browser-frame"\); $iLayer = $s.IndexOf\("@layer utilities"\); $iLayer2 = $s.IndexOf\("@layer utilities", $iLayer+1\); "ring-1 at $iRing"; "browser-frame at $iFrame"; "first @layer utilities at $iLayer"; "second @layer utilities at $iLayer2"; "---ring rule---"; $s.Substring\($iRing, 420\); "---frame rule---"; $s.Substring\($iFrame, 320\))

PowerShell($j = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\alema\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\c--Users-alema-Downloads-Trabalho-Lagos-Site-Principal\\f756ba65-98ce-415c-8cd6-b3b46dccf79e\\tasks\\wkv4dq7aa.output" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; "=== CONFIRMADOS: $\($j.confirmed.Count\) ==="; $j.confirmed | ForEach-Object { "[$\($_.severity\)] \($\($_.lens\)\) $\($_.file\):$\($_.line\) - $\($_.title\)`n  FIX: $\($_.fix\)`n" }; "=== REJEITADOS: $\($j.rejected.Count\) ==="; $j.rejected | ForEach-Object { "- $\($_.file\): $\($_.title\)" })
